node.title: Storing STC results using Javascript – Ookla Speedtest Custom
node.Stub: To help with proving a popular use case, we provided a code sample written in PHP to help demonstrate how data could be exchanged from Javascript to a SQL database.
node.Subject_Matter: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS), JavaScript, PHP, SQL, XHR

node.title: Share Service - NinjaTrader 8 Help Guide
node.Stub: NinjaTrader version 8 introduced a new class of objects that could be used to communicate to 3rd party APIs like Twitter, Facebook, or custom made to meet customer use cases. This was the API Reference that enabled a developer to start using this group of methods and types.

node.title: Beta Release Notes - NinjaTrader 8 Help Guide
node.Stub: Through the two-year beta release cycle of NinjaTrader 8, I was responsible for compiling and writing release notes that described the changes for each iteration up until the final release candidate.
